lessons.title: Greeting And To Be
lessons.description: Start your Pashto journey with standard Kabul greetings, introductions, and the essential 'To Be' verb.

lessons.title: Everyday Objects And Noun Objects
lessons.description: Learn to identify everyday items using basic nouns, demonstratives, and understand Pashto's grammatical gender.

lessons.title: Action Verb And SOV
lessons.description: Transition from identifying objects to describing actions using the present tense and the SOV framework.

lessons.title: Basic Questions
lessons.description: Learn the essential interrogative words (Who, What, Where) and how to form questions naturally.

lessons.title: Numbers 1-5
lessons.description: Master the first five numbers in Pashto and learn how they interact with objects.
